# Trigonometry in air balloon

## Short Teaching Summary
Trigonometry in air balloon: The inclination of a string tied to an air balloon above the ground can be used with trigonometry to relate the height and the string length. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
